summary: Capital One results beat Wall Street’s expectations. The bank noted signs of improving consumer credit.

headline: Capital One Earnings to Offer Signs on Consumer Health
summary: Capital One is due to report after Tuesday’s close. The bank’s vast card business is crucial for the bank and offers a broad look at how consumers are doing.

headline: Economic Momentum Flips From Blessing to Curse for S&P 500 Bulls
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Strong economic momentum is a double-edged sword for US equity traders. Solid growth is an earnings tailwind. headline: Jim Cramer Warns Investors Could Be 'Slaughtered' by Overloaded Tech Portfolios, but Backs Nvidia and Intel: 'It's Time to Go to Other Sectors'
summary: Cramer warned investors against overloading on volatile AI stocks, urged shift toward banks and industrials. Stays bullish on Nvidia, Intel.
